name: Maas Group Holdings Limited
analysis: MGH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.1200, stop A$4.8114, target A$5.6449 (1.70:1) — then trail it.
